info: Single Pixel2D phase plate (each pixel an independent, randomly initialized phase), sensor one focal length (50 mm) behind. Used by 1_design_diffraclens.py to optimize the on-axis PSF to focus on the sensor. 1000x1000 at 8 um pitch (8 mm aperture, f/6.25); this grid keeps the 50 mm propagation well inside the ASM Nyquist range (z_max = res*ps^2/wvln ~= 116 mm). Note: at a fixed aperture a finer pitch drops z_max below 50 mm, so higher resolution requires a larger aperture at the 8 um pitch floor.
